lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you join the Emissaries?

lines.speaker: Eleuia
lines.text: I wished to see my god in mortal form and serve his will. In return for my service, the Emissaries promised me they could grant that wish.

lines.speaker: Eleuia
lines.text: I wished to see my god in mortal form and be granted eternity in Mictl. In return for my service, the Emissaries promised me they could grant that wish.

lines.speaker: Eleuia
lines.text: I am a humble servant of Ranul. It has always been my hope to stand before him and be judged as worthy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Final Dawn.

lines.speaker: Eleuia
lines.text: The Final Dawn is the will of Ranul. He will show us all that death is nothing to be feared as he and Ralos guide us into forming a new world.

lines.speaker: Eleuia
lines.text: The Final Dawn is the will of Ranul. He will show us all that death is nothing to be feared. He and Ralos will lead us into forming a new world before then guiding us to Mictl.
